meaning: n.报纸或定期刊物之经销商
examples: When you buy a newspaper, take the time to have a friendly chat with the newsagent.
From today onwards, begin to find out the name of the people who serve you such as your postman and newsagent.
Newsagent Chris Green, from Ladderedge said the pavements had been "treacherous" in places, while out doing his deliveries.
Now it's just possible you may have noticed that Mr Evans is Welsh - a newsagent's son from Swansea.
